stories.title: Physicists recreate black hole energy extraction in the lab
stories.desc: Researchers have recreated the physics of extracting energy from a spinning black hole using a stationary device that produces synthetic ultrafast rotation. The achievement transforms a long-standing theoretical idea into a practical experiment and could inspire new advances in optics, wireless…

stories.title: Wild, Scenic, and Increasingly Rusty
stories.desc: Orange streams are now being spotted in hundreds of watersheds in permafrost areas throughout Alaska’s Brooks Range. The post Wild, Scenic, and Increasingly Rusty appeared first on NASA Science .
